nasb.text: But encourage one another day after day, as long as it is still called “Today,” so that none of you will be hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.

esv.text: But exhort one another every day, as long as it is called “today,” that none of you may be hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.

cnv.text: 趁著還有叫作“今天”的時候，總要天天互相勸勉，免得你們中間有人受了罪惡的誘惑，心裡就剛硬了。

ccb.text: 趁着还有今日，要天天互相劝勉，免得有人被罪迷惑，心里变得刚硬。

csbs.text: 只要日子还被称为“今天”，你们就要天天互相鼓励，免得你们当中有人被罪迷惑，心里刚硬。
